title: Hawkesbury (Eastern Ontario) - Canada.ca
content:
## Hawkesbury Eastern Ontario

## Hawkesbury Eastern Ontario
Hawkesbury is a city located in eastern Ontario that has a Francophone majority. The community of Hawkesbury provides a large number of Francophone services, which help the social, cultural and community integration of French-speaking immigrants.
